meta.description: FitJarvis daily nutrition rules based on workout plan
meta.note: Update default_body_weight_kg to your actual weight for accurate calculations

zinc_for_sleep.timing: Take 30 minutes before bed for better sleep quality

Monday.protein_note: Chest day demands high protein for muscle repair. Aim for weight x 2 grams.

meal_suggestions.pre_workout: Banana with peanut butter and black coffee
meal_suggestions.post_workout: Grilled chicken breast 200g with brown rice and steamed broccoli
meal_suggestions.dinner: Paneer tikka with whole wheat roti and cucumber salad
meal_suggestions.snacks: Handful of almonds and a boiled egg

vitamins.zinc_timing: Take zinc 30 minutes before bed for deeper sleep and chest muscle recovery

Monday.nutrition_note: Tricep and chest muscles need glycine and leucine rich foods. Include eggs and dairy today.

Tuesday.protein_note: Back training stresses the largest muscle group. Prioritize protein within 30 mins post workout.

meal_suggestions.pre_workout: Oats with banana and a scoop of protein powder
meal_suggestions.post_workout: Eggs 3 whole with whole grain toast and a glass of milk
meal_suggestions.dinner: Dal makhani with rice and a side of curd

vitamins.zinc_timing: Take zinc before sleep. Back training elevates cortisol and zinc helps regulate it.

Tuesday.nutrition_note: Bicep curl volume is high today. Add a banana post workout for fast glycogen replenishment.

Wednesday.protein_note: Leg day burns the most calories. Protein requirement is highest today. Weight x 2.2 grams recommended.

meal_suggestions.pre_workout: Rice with dal and a boiled egg 90 minutes before workout
meal_suggestions.post_workout: Protein smoothie with oats, banana, milk and peanut butter
meal_suggestions.dinner: Chicken curry with chapati and mixed vegetable salad
meal_suggestions.snacks: Pumpkin seeds and a glass of buttermilk

vitamins.zinc_timing: Zinc is critical tonight. Leg day causes maximum muscle breakdown. Take with magnesium before bed.

Wednesday.nutrition_note: Leg day is your highest calorie burn day. Do not skip carbs. Quads and hamstrings need both protein and glycogen.

Thursday.protein_note: Shoulders are small muscles but respond well to protein timing. Eat within 45 mins post workout.

meal_suggestions.pre_workout: Boiled eggs with whole wheat toast and black coffee
meal_suggestions.post_workout: Sprouts chaat with lemon and a glass of whey protein
meal_suggestions.dinner: Grilled fish or paneer with roasted vegetables and soup
meal_suggestions.snacks: Cashews and a fruit of your choice

vitamins.zinc_timing: Core training stresses the nervous system. Zinc and magnesium together improve sleep quality tonight.

Thursday.nutrition_note: Plank and Russian Twists engage deep core stabilizers. Include anti-inflammatory foods like turmeric milk tonight.

Friday.protein_note: Full body day is your second highest calorie burn. Protein target is weight x 2.2 grams today.

meal_suggestions.pre_workout: Sweet potato with boiled eggs and a black coffee
meal_suggestions.post_workout: Chicken rice bowl with steamed greens and a glass of milk
meal_suggestions.dinner: Rajma with brown rice and a side of curd

vitamins.zinc_timing: Deadlifts and full body compound movements deplete zinc rapidly. Take zinc supplement tonight without fail.

Friday.nutrition_note: Deadlift is the most demanding exercise in your plan. Your body will repair overnight. Prioritize sleep and zinc tonight.

Saturday.protein_note: Recovery day protein is still important. Maintain weight x 1.6 grams to support muscle repair from the week.

meal_suggestions.pre_workout: Light fruit bowl with chia seeds and honey
meal_suggestions.post_workout: Light khichdi with ghee and a glass of buttermilk
meal_suggestions.dinner: Vegetable soup with whole grain bread and a boiled egg
meal_suggestions.snacks: Coconut water and a handful of walnuts

vitamins.zinc_timing: Recovery day zinc helps consolidate the week's muscle gains. Take it tonight for maximum benefit.

Saturday.nutrition_note: Today is about repair not growth. Focus on easy to digest anti-inflammatory foods. Avoid heavy meals tonight.

Sunday.protein_note: Rest day protein should be weight x 1.5 grams. Your muscles are still recovering from the week.

meal_suggestions.pre_workout: Green tea with a banana and almonds
meal_suggestions.post_workout: Poha or upma with coconut chutney
meal_suggestions.dinner: Moong dal with roti and a cucumber salad
meal_suggestions.snacks: Fruit bowl with flaxseeds and a glass of warm milk

vitamins.zinc_timing: Sunday zinc dose primes your body for the new week. Take with warm milk before bed.

Sunday.nutrition_note: Sun Salutation is your only intense movement today. Savasana reduces cortisol. Keep meals light and nourishing.

weekly_summary_targets.note: These are weekly averages. High intensity days require more protein and water.
